# Previous NADO network — final account snapshot

This is the account index of the **previous NADO network**, exported from its SQLite ledger index (`acc_index`) as a public, human-readable record. Balances are the final on-chain balances in **NADO** (the ledger stores integer *raw* units; `1 NADO = 10,000,000,000 raw`).

> **The dev-fund premine is deliberately excluded.** The premine address `ndo18c3afa286439e7ebcb284710dbd4ae42bdaf21b80137b` held **99997374.6155994439 NADO** (mined only 4.6156) — it is omitted from the table below and from the circulating total, in keeping with NADO's no-premine relaunch.
